<details><summary>google/cloud-compute 2.0.0</summary>



### Ā BREAKING CHANGES

* Correct resource reference type for `parent` field in `data_chat_service.proto`
* Remove field `restricted` within encryption enforcement config.

### Features

* [Compute] update the GAPIC generator version for C# ([#8357](https://github.com/googleapis/google-cloud-php/issues/8357)) ([8fc7d40](https://github.com/googleapis/google-cloud-php/commit/8fc7d40c305ac5a30eda34ff8ca1bce36568f9d7))
